## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Dimmo to discuss content quality, UI improvements, and SEO progress.](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content quality concerns stem from UI issues (spacing, formatting) rather than actual content; fixes underway](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [30 product review pages published (90 total, 60 pending); aiming to publish 45 more this week](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [SEO showing initial improvements: 2 keywords in top 3, 25 in positions 11-20; clicks still stagnant at 20/week](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [Multiple technical fixes and improvements identified for Lucas to implement](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality and UI Improvements

  - [Initial concerns about content quality traced to UI presentation issues](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Spacing between paragraphs and bullet point formatting to be fixed](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Aiming for a cleaner look similar to reference page shared by Troy](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Lucas to update product page UI, add spacing, and fix bullet point display](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=419.0)

### Content Publishing Progress

  - [30 pages published in the last two weeks (2 weeks of backlog cleared)](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [90 product reviews total: 30 live, 60 pending](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [Targeting 45 more to go live this week](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [Total content approaching 200 articles (15/week pace)](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)

### SEO Performance

  - [Slight improvements in keyword rankings:](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
      - [2 keywords now in top 3 positions (up from 0)](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
      - [25 keywords in positions 11-20](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [Clicks remain stagnant at 20/week, 75,000 impressions/week](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [Focus on improving product page rankings to drive relevant traffic](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)

### Technical Improvements Needed

  - [301 redirects for blog posts to product pages (list to be provided)](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Create listing pages for Software Alternatives and Software Features clusters](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Add listing pages to website footer for improved indexing](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Internal linking implementation pending](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Backup of old content before deletion](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
  - [Streamline content publishing process (currently 45 mins/page due to formatting issues)](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)

### CMS and Publishing Workflow

  - [Webhook trigger process explained for pushing CMS updates live](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
  - [Content formatting loss when copy-pasting into Strapi CMS identified as major time sink](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to provide list of blog posts needing 301 redirects to product pages](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Lucas to implement UI fixes (spacing, bullet points, "Read More" button)](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=419.0)
  - [Lucas to create listing pages for content clusters and add to footer](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Troy to coordinate with Lev on creating overview pages and internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Lucas to investigate solutions for preserving formatting when copy-pasting into Strapi](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
  - [Team to schedule additional time to address remaining technical fixes](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Continue aggressive content publishing to clear backlog](https://fathom.video/share/Hra_2yaay4kiPDNASDzeo_3TJk9inoyp?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
